versions.name: Chilkoot High Adventure Base
versions.summary: Great Alaska Council high-adventure base on the Chilkat Peninsula near Haines, offering custom multi-day backpacking, sea kayaking, mountaineering, and whitewater rafting expeditions for Scouts BSA.

provenance.notes: Coordinate corrected 2026-07-22 to Haines / Chilkat Peninsula (approximate, town-level); it was wrongly stamped on Denali High Adventure Scout Base's point ~600 km away. Imported from camp-finder; raw description and sessions dropped (operational data stays at the council site). verified_at is camp-finder's own source-confirmation date; imported_at is when open-scout-api ingested it. The evergreen summary is original prose regenerated from that description, excluding dates/fees/schedules. camp_type classified from program_types.
